fault_codes.description: Pressure sensor open/faulty
manufacturer_steps: Check the operation of the pressure sensor

source_refs.source_quote: H.00 .42 Pressure sensor open/faulty SENSOR/CONNECTION PROBLEM Check the operation of the pressure sensor Check the sensor/PCB connection

fault_codes.description: Temporary communication failure in the PCB

source_refs.source_quote: H.01 .00 Temporary communication failure in the PCB The error is resolved automatically

fault_codes.description: Maximum temperature difference value between flow and return reached.
manufacturer_steps: Check the cleanliness of the exchanger
Check the operation of the temperature sensors

source_refs.source_quote: H.01 .05 Maximum temperature difference value between flow and return reached. INSUFFICIENT CIRCULATION Check the boiler/installation circulation Activate a manual venting cycle Check the installation pressure OTHER CAUSES Check the cleanliness of the exchanger Check the operation of the temperature sensors Check the temperature sensor connection

fault_codes.description: Flow temperature increase in heating mode too quick.
manufacturer_steps: Check the operation of the pump
Check the cleanliness of the exchanger
Check the operation of the temperature sensors

source_refs.source_quote: H.01 .08 Flow temperature increase in heating mode too quick. INSUFFICIENT CIRCULATION Check the boiler/installation circulation Activate a manual venting cycle Check the installation pressure Check the operation of the pump OTHER CAUSES Check the cleanliness of the exchanger Check the operation of the temperature sensors Check the temperature sensor connection

fault_codes.description: Maximum flow or return temperature value reached.

source_refs.source_quote: H.01 .14 Maximum flow or return temperature value reached. INSUFFICIENT CIRCULATION Check the boiler/installation circulation Activate a manual venting cycle

fault_codes.description: No water circulation (temporary).
manufacturer_steps: Check the operation of the pump
Check the operation of the temperature sensors

source_refs.source_quote: H.01 .18 No water circulation (temporary). INSUFFICIENT CIRCULATION Check the installation pressure Activate a manual venting cycle Check the operation of the pump Check the boiler/installation circulation TEMPERATURE SENSOR ERROR Check the operation of the temperature sensors Check the temperature sensor connection

fault_codes.description: Flow temperature increase during domestic hot water operation too fast.
manufacturer_steps: Check the operation of the pump
Check the operation of the temperature sensors
Check the connection of the temperature sensors

source_refs.source_quote: H.01 .21 Flow temperature increase during domestic hot water operation too fast. INSUFFICIENT CIRCULATION Check the installation pressure Activate a manual venting cycle Check the operation of the pump Check the boiler/installation circulation TEMPERATURE SENSOR ERROR Check the operation of the temperature sensors Check the connection of the temperature sensors

fault_codes.description: Reset in progress.

source_refs.source_quote: H.02 .00 Reset in progress. It resolves itself

fault_codes.description: Waiting for configuration settings to be entered (CN1,CN2).

source_refs.source_quote: H.02 .02 Waiting for configuration settings to be entered (CN1,CN2). CN1/CN2 CONFIGURATION MISSING Configure CN1/CN2

fault_codes.description: Configuration settings (CN1,CN2) not entered correctly.

source_refs.source_quote: H.02 .03 Configuration settings (CN1,CN2) not entered correc-tly. Check configuration CN1/CN2 Configure CN1/CN2 correctly

fault_codes.description: PCB settings cannot be read.

source_refs.source_quote: H.02 .04 PCB settings cannot be read. MAIN PCB ERROR Configure CN1/CN2 Replace the main PCB

source_refs.source_quote: H.02 .05 Setting memory not compatible with the boiler PCB ty-pe. Contact the Service Network

fault_codes.description: Low pressure in heating circuit (water filling required).

source_refs.source_quote: H.02 .07 Low pressure in heating circuit (water filling required). Check the installation pressure and restore Check the expansion vessel pressure Check for boiler/installation leaks

fault_codes.description: Partial stoppage of the boiler (antifreeze function active)
manufacturer_steps: Contact X15 open, check connected devices

source_refs.source_quote: H.02 .09 Partial stoppage of the boiler (antifreeze function acti-ve) SIGNAL INDICATING BLOCKING INPUT Contact X15 open, check connected devices Parameter configuration error: Check AP001

manufacturer_steps: Contact X15 open, check connected devices

Check the condition of the electrode
Check the pipes and the terminal

source_refs.source_quote: H.03 .05 Power supply voltage too low ELECTRODE PROBLEM Check the mains voltage Check the electrode electrical connections Check the condition of the electrode
